cells.rationale: The acceptance is explicit, but implementing the contract-shaped arming gate safely requires substantial coordinated edits across event, RPC, daemon, routing, and test surfaces.

Crash-safe transition retention, independent policy fencing, deterministic Fold behavior, and publication acknowledgement form a subtle cross-cutting correctness invariant requiring top-tier reasoning.
Consolidating user-facing lifecycle guidance without contradictions or invented diagnostics requires documentation judgment and careful idiom matching across three surfaces.
